modules.name: Authentication
modules.description: JWT-based authentication endpoints for user login and token management

endpoints.name: User Login
endpoints.description: Authenticate a user using email, username, or staff ID. Returns access and refresh tokens.

endpoints.name: Refresh Access Token
endpoints.description: Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token.

endpoints.name: Get Current User
endpoints.description: Retrieve detailed information about the currently authenticated user.

endpoints.name: Verify Token
endpoints.description: Validate a JWT token and check if it's still valid.

endpoints.name: List Tenant Users
endpoints.description: Get a list of all users within a specific tenant.
